title: [Keyboard] Support stateful shortcut activators
body_short: Currently all shortcut activators are stateless (despite having a "session"). The following features might require stateful activators to implement: - Long pressing a key. - Tap a shift with no key events between its down and up. - Ctrl-A, Ctrl-D.
